name: dg_vezegakr5r53_melanocyte
prompt: Clean clinical infographic, 16:9, dark teal background (#0E1D23) with bright teal (#12B3AE) and white line art. A simple cross-section diagram of skin layers with a labeled melanocyte cell deep in the skin releasing pigment granules. Big clear English labels: 'MELANOCYTE', 'PIGMENT'. Modern flat medical illustration, Vox-explainer style, crisp, minimal, high contrast.

name: dg_vezegakr5r53_pigment_switch
prompt: Clean clinical infographic, 16:9, dark teal background with teal and white and a warning amber accent. A stylized 'factory switch' turned up too high dumping extra brown melanin into one patch of skin. Big English labels: 'TYROSINASE = THE SWITCH', 'TOO HOT -> BROWN SPOT'. Flat modern medical illustration, Vox style, minimal, high contrast.

name: dg_vezegakr5r53_three_compounds
prompt: Clean clinical infographic, 16:9, dark teal background, teal and white. Three simple icon panels side by side, each a rosemary-leaf icon, labeled in big English text: 'ROSMARINIC ACID - quiets the switch', 'CARNOSIC ACID - antioxidant bodyguard', 'URSOLIC ACID - feeds collagen'. Flat modern infographic, Vox style, one job each, minimal, high contrast.

name: dg_vezegakr5r53_collagen_scaffold
prompt: Clean clinical infographic, 16:9, dark teal background, teal and white line art. A simple lattice/scaffold of collagen fibers under skin being reinforced, arrows pushing it firm. Big English labels: 'COLLAGEN SCAFFOLD', 'URSOLIC ACID = SUPPORT'. Flat modern medical illustration, Vox style, minimal, high contrast.

name: dg_vezegakr5r53_night_repair_clock
prompt: Clean clinical infographic, 16:9, dark teal background, teal and white. A 24-hour clock face with the night hours highlighted in bright teal, small icons around it: turnover x2, blood flow, growth hormone, low cortisol. Big English label: 'NIGHT = REPAIR WINDOW'. Flat modern infographic, Vox style, minimal, high contrast.

name: dg_vezegakr5r53_day_vs_night
prompt: Clean clinical infographic, 16:9, split in two halves. Left half warm/bright labeled 'DAY - UV FLIPS THE SWITCH ON' with a sun icon over skin; right half dark teal labeled 'NIGHT - REPAIR, NO SUN' with a moon icon. Big clear English labels. Flat modern infographic, Vox style, high contrast.

name: dg_vezegakr5r53_three_layers
prompt: Clean clinical infographic, 16:9, dark teal background, teal and white. Three stacked layer bars labeled in big English text: 'LAYER 1 - ROSEMARY WATER', 'LAYER 2 - INFUSED OIL', 'LAYER 3 - GENTLE BUFF (weekly)', with a small moon icon meaning 'all at night'. Flat modern infographic, Vox style, minimal, high contrast.
